brainstorm.reviewerNotes: Brainstorm artifact = parent project PRD at docs/projects/P003-entity-system-redesign/prd.md. Scope crystallized via project decomposition: F4 (gitignore .meta.json + backlog.md, regenerate on demand, emit pd-state.diff.md generator), F7 (generalized data-file guard hook with config table path_pattern → mcp_tool_hint), F8 (entity_display table separating identity from display metadata — UUID is identity, seq+slug are decoration). Per P003 roadmap M3 — Phase 3 Projections and Guards. Persistent decomposition warning acknowledged: 110 bundles projection (read-path) + guard (write-path) responsibilities, deferred unless >800 LOC at create-plan time.

specify.reviewerNotes: Spec-reviewer: 3 iterations (cap-3 reached). Iter-1 found 4 blockers + 8 warnings + 2 suggestions — all resolved in rev 2. Iter-2 approved with 6 warnings + 3 suggestions — all addressed in rev 3. Iter-3 caught 3 NEW empirical blockers introduced by iter-2 fixes (pathlib.match Python 3.12 gap, phase_events CHECK violation, NOT NULL columns) — all 3 fixed inline in rev 4 (no iter-4 review per cap; fixes were factual corrections per empirical evidence). Phase-reviewer: 1 iteration approved with 3 warnings + 2 suggestions (hook path correction, F-numbering, table name inconsistency, test migration callout, pre-commit-guard.sh modification details) — all resolved inline. Final spec at revision 4 covers F4 (sealed write path + pd-state.diff.md gitignored local artifact) + F7 (generalized data-file guard via fnmatch dispatch table) + F8 (entity_display table + migration 13 with mandatory mismatch audit + dedicated migration_audit_log forensic table).

design.reviewerNotes: Design-reviewer: 2 iterations (cap-3 effectively reached at iter-2 when 3 NEW factual blockers surfaced; fixed inline in rev 3 without iter-3 adversarial review). Iter-1 6 blockers all resolved in rev 2 (algorithm committed, backlog format pinned, archive trigger clarified via existing update_entity MCP, TD-7b audit added, AST orthogonality verified, register_entity 1:1 invariant closed). Iter-2 3 blockers (fix_actions symbol mismatch, archive_entity MCP introduced erroneously, TD-10 two-format reality) all resolved in rev 3. Phase-reviewer: 1 iteration approved with 1 warning + 1 suggestion (stale R7, spec FR-4.3 override note) — both fixed inline. Design at rev 3 covers 11 TDs (TD-1 fnmatch verified-behavior; TD-2 dedicated migration_audit_log; TD-3 sys.path insert/pop; TD-4 DB-sourced timestamps; TD-5 git edge cases enumerated; TD-6 3-check pre-flight gate; TD-7 PRAGMA table_info introspection; TD-7b entity_id parsing audit + lint; TD-8 down-migration runtime-only; TD-9 pd-state.diff.md format; TD-10 two-format backlog projection; TD-11 4 drift classes for doctor autofix replacement) + 9 cross-file invariants in §5 + 9 risks. Plan-phase deferrals named: TD-11 4 ACs, TD-7b lint AC, EntityIdFormatError precondition AC, AC-4.2a whitespace-normalized comparison script.

create-plan.reviewerNotes: Combined cycle 2 iterations effective. Plan-reviewer: 2 iters (iter-1 3 blockers fixed in rev 2; iter-2 approved with 2 warnings + 1 suggestion all fixed inline). Task-reviewer: 1 iter (5 blockers + 4 warnings + 3 suggestions all fixed inline post-cap per same-pattern as design phase). Phase-reviewer: 1 iter approved with 4 warnings all fixed inline. Cap-3 reached. Tasks at rev 3 cover all 15 Groups with ~70 tasks (after adding 2.0 register_entity + EntityIdFormatError, 2.8/2.9 single-tx tests, 5.3-5.6 projection determinism, 9.7/10.6/10.7 hooks-registration tests, 14.9 empty-tree). Major fixes: hooks.json env var (CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT), backfill.py line 491 (meta.get target), TDD-discipline preamble, Step 6 (not 5) in add-to-backlog port, in-process WorkflowStateEngine MCP invocation pattern for autofix wrappers, migration 13 execution order (audit before backfill INSERT), pd_base_branch config-file-read pattern. Remaining minor warnings (test placement, mixed verification, dependency graph polish) deferred to implement-phase or retro.
